lineage.method: v_alpha_v1_lsk3 11-factor score with one M2.2 addition: F08 funding_term_skew_60 (rolling 60d skew of daily funding_rate per subject, doc §D MF-04 F08). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

f08_admission_2026_04_29.g1_borderline_note: Raw IC 0.032 is below G1 strict 0.04 but matches F12 admission precedent (F12 raw IC 0.023). Strong t-stat (6.13) compensates.
f08_admission_2026_04_29.sign_vs_doc: POSITIVE empirically; doc prescribes NEGATIVE (high positive skew → mean reversion). Possible mechanism: high-skew subjects have ongoing right-tail funding events proxying for sustained buying pressure.
f08_admission_2026_04_29.weight_calibration: Initial calibration weight = raw_IC * 3.25 (matches v91 |w|/|IC| ratio) = 0.10. But w=0.10 collapsed walk-forward median to +1.20 (44% drop vs lsk3_g_v2 baseline +2.147). Weight scan {0.04, 0.05, 0.06, 0.08, 0.10} selected w=0.06 as Pareto-optimal: walk-forward median +2.110 (essentially lsk3_g_v2 parity), strict_pass on both walk_forward_assessment and regime_holdout, loss_window_fraction 0.375 (under v10 0.40 cap). w=0.04 had loss_window_fraction 0.406 (FAIL); w=0.08 had wf median +1.30 (regression).

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: M2.2 v4 score: extends v_alpha_v1_lsk3's 11 hand-tuned factors by adding F08 funding_term_skew_60 (rolling 60d skew of daily funding_rate per subject, doc §D MF-04 F08). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay (alpha_ontology_regime_gating_v2). Hypothesis: F08 captures funding-distribution asymmetry over a 60d window — assets with right-tail funding events (recent positive funding spikes) have ongoing buying pressure that persists 5d forward. Empirical sign is POSITIVE on this panel (opposite of doc's prescribed negative sign). Admission: G6 residual IC vs lsk3 11-factor = +0.030 (t=+5.61), strongly orthogonal to baseline; G3 same-sign 2/3 across BTC vol regimes; G1 raw IC +0.032 borderline below 0.04 threshold but matches F12 precedent.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp signed-z-score construction. Score adds +0.10 * z(funding_term_skew_60). Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.3 below v_alpha_v1_lsk3_g_v2 (+2.147) without compensating gain in regime metrics; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.0 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) F08 weight produces over-concentration (single-quarter edge contribution > 0.65 cap).
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.06*z(funding_term_skew_60); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: M2.2 v4 score: lsk3 11-factor + F08 funding_term_skew_60 (60d rolling skew of daily funding_rate per subject) + W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. F08 admission: G6 PASS vs lsk3 (residual IC +0.030, t=+5.61); G3 PASS (2/3 regimes same sign); G1 borderline (raw IC +0.032 below 0.04 strict threshold but t=+6.13 highly significant; matches F12 precedent at IC +0.023). Lifecycle 'experimental' until cycle verifies walk_forward / regime metrics vs v1_lsk3_g_v2 baseline.
